decisions.briefing: Markets dipped mildly today (S&P -0.7%, NASDAQ -0.8%) in neutral territory — a routine pullback, not a signal to go defensive. AMZN is being cut early at -5.4% before the automated -7% stop-loss fires, rotating that capital into four high-conviction momentum names (NN, CORT, RXO, AGYS) that are showing volume-confirmed breakouts even on a down tape — a strong sign of relative strength. This brings positions to 9, fully deploying capital into names with the best technical setups.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities pulled back modestly on May 19 with the S&P 500 down 0.7% and NASDAQ off 0.8%, reflecting mild profit-taking after recent gains as investors reassessed valuations ahead of upcoming Fed commentary. Treasury yields ticked up slightly, pressuring growth and tech names, while defensive sectors held relatively firm. The mild, broad-based decline is consistent with normal mean-reversion after an extended run, not a structural shift in market direction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於5月19日小幅回落，標普500指數下跌0.7%，納斯達克指數跌0.8%，主要受到投資人在近期大漲後獲利了結情緒影響，加上市場等待聯儲局最新政策訊號而保持觀望。美債殖利率小幅上升，對成長型及科技股形成壓力，防禦性板塊相對抗跌。整體而言，此次回調屬正常技術性修正，並非市場趨勢逆轉的訊號。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set rule that automatically sells a position once it falls a certain percentage below your purchase price, limiting how much you can lose on any single trade. In today's case, AMZN is down about 5.4% from its average cost and trending further down — selling now before the -7% automatic trigger means we choose when to exit rather than waiting for the rule to force us out at a worse price. Proactive stop discipline preserves capital for better opportunities.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止損（Stop-Loss）是一種預先設定的交易規則：當持倉跌幅達到某個百分比時，自動賣出以控制虧損。今天的例子是亞馬遜（AMZN）——該持倉已從平均成本下跌約5.4%，且技術面持續走弱。主動在系統觸發-7%自動止損前出場，意味著我們掌握主動權，而非被動等待規則強制執行。良好的止損紀律能保存資本，讓資金流向更具機會的標的。
